site.name: Leopold-Figl-Observatorium (Mitterschöpfl)
site.comment: Approximate observatory coordinates (LFOA, Mt. Mitterschöpfl); refine if needed.

meta.derived_from: PICO instrument spec sheet (detector/optics) + provisional photometry
meta.status_banner: PROVISIONAL — PICO detector & optics values are from the instrument spec sheet; the zero points, sky rate and extinction are ESTIMATED (not measured) and should not be used for calibrated photometry.
meta.notes: Detector/optics from spec: Andor Zyla 4.2-P 2048x2048 sCMOS, 6.5 um pixels, 0.9 e- read noise, >80% QE, 0.1 e-/px/s dark @ 0 C, 100 fps; 1.5 m f/8.33, 0.105 arcsec/px, 3.6 arcmin FoV. Sky/dark rates are stored per UNBINNED pixel (reference_binning=1). ASSUMED (not measured): full-well saturation ~30000 e- (gain 0.46 e-/ADU x 65535 ADU), dark doubling 6.3 K, readout 0.01 s (100 fps). Zero points are PROVISIONAL: scaled from the Vienna 0.8 m V/R zero points by the collecting-area ratio (1.5/0.8)^2 = 3.52 and an assumed QE ratio 0.82/0.55 = 1.49, i.e. +1.80 mag; replace with on-sky standards. Sky rates assume a typical dark-site surface brightness (mu_V~21.0, mu_R~20.5 mag/arcsec^2) folded through the provisional zero points + pixel scale. Extinction k are literature typical values. Only the two Bessel photometric filters (V, R) are modelled; the 4 polarisation filters (0/45/90/135 deg) and the coronagraphic masks (OD 5/8.75/12.5 mag; 1.5/3/6 arcsec) are NOT modelled in the ETC.
